svg.title: Polymarket analysis project flow v6
svg.desc: Two-track pipeline for Part A and Part B merging into final deliverable.

g.text: Q1: Which are the most actively traded Polymarket events currently?
Q2: What kinds of events are currently being traded on Polymarket?
Q3: Can an LLM agent be used in prediction-market trading?
Q4: How can trading data be used to detect abnormal
Q5: Is there evidence of insider-like trading behavior
